prompt:
Use case: style-transfer
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: regenerate the Banner Surgeon as a distinct Order support unit using the approved Squire Operative as the color and rendering anchor
Subject: a lighter field medic and banner carrier with a hood or soft cowl, visible medic satchel, surgical tools, compact sidearm or injector, service banner, slimmer armor than the House Marshal, and a support-oriented stance
Style/medium: moody post-apocalyptic tactics sprite illustration with stronger pixel clustering, chunkier readable shapes, and a painterly pixel-art-inspired finish that survives downscaling cleanly
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, grounded battlefield-ready stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: warm bunker light with restrained contrast, no cold aquatic glow, no teal rim-lighting
Color palette: vibrant dark wine red, warm parchment ivory, aged brass, weathered iron black
Constraints: keep the Order faction material language from the approved Squire anchor, make the silhouette clearly lighter and more support-oriented than a frontline commander, emphasize medic gear and banner read over brute force, rendered around 101px tall in game, prioritize large readable pixel-like shapes and reduced micro-detail so the sprite holds up at tactical scale, no floor, no scenery, no text
Avoid: House Marshal silhouette, closed helmet, long rifle, fantasy healer tropes, myrmidon-style lighting, cool cyan glow, photorealism, anime gloss, cinematic background, fine noisy texture, oversized empty padding, extra characters, extra props
